Twin Vee to merge with Greenland-focused miner USFM
USFM Signs Agreement With Twin Vee PowerCats To Combine Its Subsidiary With, Into Twin Vee; Financial Terms Undisclosed
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Co's Recreational Marine Business Will Be Separated Into a Privately Held Co Prior to Closing, Held Through a Newly Formed Delaware Statutory Trust >VEEE
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Existing Co Stockholders Will Receive Non-Transferable Contingent Value Right Entitling Them to Future Distributions Generated by That Business >VEEE
*Twin Vee PowerCats: Upon Closing, Co Common Stockholders Will Receive Equity in the Combined Public Co >VEEE
*USFM Corp to Combine With Twin Vee PowerCats Co., Creating Publicly Traded Co Focused on Greenland's Disko-Nuussuaq District-Scale Magmatic Nickel-Copper-Cobalt-PGE Project

scored_items.title: Jasper Therapeutics completes acquisition of Kira Pharmaceuticals
Jasper Therapeutics posts investor presentation on Kira merger, PIPE financing and immunology pipeline strategy
*Jasper Therapeutics Completed Acquisition of Kira Pharmaceuticals >JSPR

Jasper Therapeutics Completes The Acquisition Of Kira Pharmaceuticals; Announces $132M Private Placement Of Convertible Preferred Stock; Combined Company Operations Expected To Be Funded Through Second Half Of 2028
Jasper Therapeutics completes acquisition of Kira Pharmaceuticals in all-stock deal
JASPER THERAPEUTICS - COMPLETES ALL-STOCK ACQUISITION OF KIRA PHARMACEUTICALS
Press Release: Jasper Therapeutics Announces Merger with Kira Pharmaceuticals
*Jasper Therapeutics Announces Merger With Kira Pharmaceuticals >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics: Jeet Mahal to Be Pres and CEO of Combined Co
*Kira Out-Licenses KP-301, Long-Acting anti-C5a Monoclonal Antibody, and KP-402, Small Molecule C5a Receptor Antagonist, to Mirador Therapeutics, for $12 M
*Jasper Therapeutics: Combined Co Will Focus on Advancing Consolidated Pipeline of Potential Best-In-Class Innovative Therapies for Immunologically-Driven Disorders >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics: Proceeds Will Be Used to Fund Development of the Combined Co's Pipeline Through 2H of 2028 >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics: Private Placement Expected to Result in Proceeds of About $132 M >JSPR
*Jasper Therapeutics Entered Securities Purchase Agreement for Sale of Non-Voting Convertible Preferred Stk in Private Placement Transaction >JSPR
Press Release: Jasper Therapeutics Announces -2-
